assumptions: The developer has a supported browser and can run Python and pip locally.
No Fireworks account, payment method, credits, API key, or Serverless request exists yet.

developer_goal: Fund Fireworks credits, create an API key, and complete a cURL Serverless chat-completions call.

first_success.outcome: POST https://api.fireworks.ai/inference/v1/chat/completions with a Bearer key returns model output such as ¡Hola!.
first_success.observable_signal: Assistant content is present in the HTTP JSON response.

route_selection.surface: Fireworks dashboard signup plus Serverless Quickstart
route_selection.rule: Email, Google, GitHub, and LinkedIn signup are peer identity routes with no documented default; do not invent a winner among them.

candidates.name: Email signup then Serverless Python SDK first call
candidates.reason: Public signup shows Email then Next, but verification and post-email fields are not fully exposed before Next.

candidates.name: Google, GitHub, or LinkedIn OAuth signup then Serverless Python SDK first call
candidates.reason: Three peer OAuth buttons sit beside email; each changes external authorization without an official default.

candidates.name: OpenAI or Anthropic compatible SDK examples on the same Quickstart
candidates.reason: Alternate clients after the same unresolved account and credit prerequisites.

required_path.action: Create a Fireworks account from app.fireworks.ai/signup and accept Terms of service and Data Processing Agreement.

required_fields.label: Identity route (Email, Google, GitHub, or LinkedIn)
Email
required_fields.notes: Visible for the email path; OAuth routes may not collect it on this screen.

required_fields.label: Terms of service and Data Processing Agreement

required_path.observable_result: The developer reaches an authenticated Fireworks dashboard.

required_path.action: Ensure the account has usable prepaid credits for Serverless usage.

required_fields.label: Payment method and billing address
required_fields.notes: Credit FAQ requires adding payment method and purchasing credits before usage; whether a $1 starter credit still applies without a card is unclear.

required_path.observable_result: The account has a positive credit balance usable for Serverless calls.

required_path.action: Create an API key in the Fireworks dashboard and copy it.
required_path.observable_result: An API key value is available to export as FIREWORKS_API_KEY.

required_path.action: Run the published Serverless chat.completions.create example and print the content.
required_path.observable_result: The terminal prints the Serverless model reply.

required_path.action: POST https://api.fireworks.ai/inference/v1/chat/completions with Authorization Bearer and confirm model output.
required_path.observable_result: Model output such as ¡Hola! is returned.

prerequisites.description: Local Python and pip are available for the Serverless Quickstart.

external_gates.description: Signup requires agreeing to Terms of service and the Data Processing Agreement.
Fireworks uses prepaid credits; usage pauses when the balance reaches zero without auto top-up.

platform_outcomes.description: Fireworks returns a Serverless chat completion for the selected model.

excluded.reason: Separate from the Serverless API first-call terminal.
Documented as advanced Serverless options after the basic first call.
Quickstart documents an equivalent cURL call.

sources.title: Sign Up - Fireworks AI
evidence_supported: Terms of service and Data Processing Agreement

sources.title: Credit system
evidence_supported: Add payment method and purchase credits before usage

sources.title: How do credits work?
evidence_supported: Payment method required to continue after depletion

uncertainties.question: Which of the four peer signup routes (email, Google, GitHub, LinkedIn) is the shortest complete path, and what verification screens follow?
uncertainties.impact: Identity choice changes external handoffs and possibly email waits, so no single verified account path can be selected.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Official default identity recommendation or dated walkthroughs of each signup option through authenticated dashboard access.

uncertainties.question: Does a brand-new account receive usable free credits that allow the first Serverless call without adding a payment method?
uncertainties.impact: If the $1 credit still applies without a card, payment is not on the critical path; if prepaid purchase is required first, billing becomes a required gate.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Fresh-account billing observation showing starting credit balance and whether a Serverless call succeeds before any payment method is added.
